summary: Excellent audience recording that captures the concert’s high‑energy vibe, with a superb board source adding clarity
review: The reviewer raves about both the board and audience tapes, calling the sound “real good” and “truly amazing,” saying it recreates the feeling of being at Deer Creek. While no specific songs are singled out, the show is described as a peak moment of the summer tour with high‑energy performance throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it rates the show and recording very highly; combined weighting yields a strong overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape described as amazing and fully immersive; board source also praised as sounding real good with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally praised as a high‑energy peak of the summer tour, though specific set details are not discussed.
